resourceTemplates.name: instagram-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public Instagram profile data, recent posts, and related accounts by required `handle`. Set optional `trim` to true for a smaller response.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-basic-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram basic profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns a basic Instagram profile by `userId`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-posts
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram posts
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public posts from an Instagram profile by required `handle`. Supports pagination with optional `next_max_id` and optional trimmed responses with `trim`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-post-info
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram post or reel info
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed public information for an Instagram post or reel by required public `url`. Set optional `trim` to true for a smaller response.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for an Instagram post or reel by required public `url` when speech is detected.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-search-reels
resourceTemplates.title: Search Instagram reels
resourceTemplates.description: Searches public Instagram reels by required `query`. Supports optional `page` pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-comments
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram comments
resourceTemplates.description: Returns comments from an Instagram post or reel by required public `url`. Supports pagination with optional `cursor`.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-reels
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram reels
resourceTemplates.description: Returns public reels from an Instagram profile. Use either `user_id` or `handle`, prefer `user_id` for faster responses, paginate with optional `max_id`, and optionally set `trim` to true.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-highlights
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram story highlights
resourceTemplates.description: Returns story highlights for an Instagram user. Use either `user_id` or `handle`, and prefer `user_id` for faster responses.

resourceTemplates.name: instagram-embed-html
resourceTemplates.title: Get Instagram embed HTML
resourceTemplates.description: Returns the HTML embed for an Instagram user profile by required `handle`.
